title: HUMAN RIGHTS PROGRAM - 211info
text: CITY OF EUGENE OFFICE OF EQUITY & COMMUNITY ENGAGEMENT HUMAN RIGHTS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Fields discrimination complaints related to housing, employment, public access (including accessibility requests and grievances), and city contracts that occur within the City of Eugene. Also provides victim and community information and referrals in response to hate and bias activity. 500 East 4th Avenue Suite 101 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday by appointment only Email (541) 682-5177 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 682-5177 Alternate (844) 924-2427 Reporting Complaints Or Concerns Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for appointment. Visit website for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Eugene Services: Employment Discrimination Assistance Government Complaints/Government Ombudsman Offices Hate Crimes Reporting Housing Discrimination Assistance Specialized Information and Referral * Hate Crimes/Hate Incident Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF EUGENE OFFICE OF EQUITY & COMMUNITY ENGAGEMENT
